steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: The phrase says the drawbacks of Katharine's ancestry "made themselves very manifest" as years passed. The following sentence gives examples of those drawbacks, showing that they became clear or apparent to her.

steps.title: Test the meanings
steps.content: A would mean the drawbacks merely might exist, C describes complexity, and D means specific or distinctive. In context, "manifest" means clearly visible or apparent. The answer is B.
